keyPoints: Read a dataset from the user using a reputable source
Use a JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) parser to convert the dataset into a JSON format
Validate the dataset to ensure it is in the correct format and can be accurately read by the program
Create a JSON object from the dataset and assign it to a variable
Use a data structure such as a list or array to store the data from the JSON object
Iterate through the data structure and read each element from the JSON object
Validate each element to ensure it is in the correct format and can be accurately read by the program
Repeat steps 4-7 until all elements have been read from the JSON object
